zh.lifeSummary: 當Christoph Gärtner於1567年6月5日出生在德國薩辛米特勒勒 艾爾茲格比斯可萊斯格洛斯盧可斯瓦爾德時，他的父親Bartel Gaertner42歲，母親Christina Neumann37歲。他於1585年與Christina Gaetner在德國薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格維薩結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1640年12月11日在德國薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格維薩享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christoph Gärtner于1567年6月5日出生在德国薩辛米特勒勒 艾爾茲格比斯可萊斯格洛斯盧可斯瓦爾德时，他的父亲Bartel Gaertner42岁，母亲Christina Neumann37岁。他于1585年与Christina Gaetner在德国薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格維薩结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1640年12月11日在德国薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格維薩享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gärtner
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt, Gerda, Johann, Lorenz, Otto, Wolfgang, Bernd, Dieter, Frieda, Fritz, Gerhard.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) (also Gärtner): occupational name for a gardener or vintner, from an agent derivative of Middle High German garte ‘enclosure, garden’. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and in Slovenia (see 2 below). Compare Gaertner and Gardner .
Slovenian: of German origin (see 1 above). In North America, this surname may also be an altered form of the Slovenized variant Gartnar.

variants.name: Gaertner
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Franz, Helmut, Kurt, Dieter, Erna, Ernst, Gerhard, Hans, Irmgard, Karl Heinz, Ulrich.

variants.name: Gardner
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name from Middle English gardener ‘gardener’, Old French gardinier, jardinier.
Americanized form (translation into English) of German Gärtner or Gartner and French Desjardins .

variants.name: Gertner
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Alter, Chaim, Izidor, Mendel, Meyer, Shimon, Shmuel, Zalman.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of Gärtner ‘gardener’ (see Gartner ).

variants.name: Gartmann
meanings: German and Swiss German: occupational name for a gardener (see   Gartner  ); in some cases it may be a status name, referring to the owner of a small (enclosed or fenced) farm, or occupational name for a worker at a deer preserve (see   Garth  ). Compare   Gartman   and   Girtman  .
German: habitational name for someone from Garte near Osnabrück.

nameMeanings.name: Christoph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

en.lifeSummary: When Christoph Gärtner was born on 5 June 1567, in Großrückerswalde, Mittlerer Erzgebirgskreis, Saxony, Germany, his father, Bartel Gaertner, was 42 and his mother, Christina Neumann, was 37. He married Christina Gaetner in 1585, in Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Saxony, Germany. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 11 December 1640, in Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Saxony, Germany, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christoph Gärtner est né le 5 juin 1567, à Großrückerswalde, Mittlerer Erzgebirgskreis, Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Bartel Gaertner, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Christina Neumann, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Christina Gaetner en 1585, à Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 11 décembre 1640, à Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christoph Gärtner am 5. Juni 1567 in Großrückerswalde, Mittlerer Erzgebirgskreis, Sachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bartel Gaertner 42 und seine Mutter Christina Neumann 37. Er hat 1585 in Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Deutschland Christina Gaetner geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 11. Dezember 1640 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christoph Gärtner è nato il il 5 giugno 1567 nel Großrückerswalde, Mittlerer Erzgebirgskreis, Sachsen, Germania, il suo padre, Bartel Gaertner, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Christina Neumann, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Christina Gaetner nel 1585, nel Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 11 dicembre 1640, nel Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Germania, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Christoph Gärtnerが1567年6月5日にドイツサチセンミットラーエル エルズジェバーグスクレイスグロssルuッカースワルドで生まれた時，父Bartel Gaertnerは42歳，母Christina Neumannは37歳であった。1585年にドイツサチセンクレイス アナバーグウィエサでChristina Gaetnerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1640年12月11日にドイツサチセンクレイス アナバーグウィエサで73歳で死去した。

ko.Großrückerswalde, Amt Wolkenstein, Saxon: 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 커프u르스투 작센 아트 울켄스타인 그로ssu커스월드
ko.lifeSummary: Christoph Gärtner(이)가 1567년 6월 5일 독일 작센 미틀레레어 르즈그비르그스크레이스 그로ssu커스월드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bartel Gaertner(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Christina Neumann(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1585년 독일 작센 크레이스 애나버그 위사에서 Christina Gaetner(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1640년 12월 11일 독일 작센 크레이스 애나버그 위사에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Großrückerswalde, Amt Wolkenstein, Saxon: Großrückerswalde, Amt Wolkenstein, Kurfürstentum Sachsen, Heiliges Römisches Reich
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christoph Gärtner nasceu em 5 de junho de 1567, em Großrückerswalde, Mittlerer Erzgebirgskreis, Sachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Bartel Gaertner, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Christina Neumann, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Christina Gaetner em 1585, em Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de dezembro de 1640, em Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Alemanha, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christoph Gärtner родился 5 июня 1567 г. в местности гроssрuккирсвалд, миттлирир эрзгебиргскрис, сачсен, Германия, его отцу по имени Bartel Gaertner было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Christina Neumann, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Christina Gaetner в 1585 г. в местности виеса, крис аннабирг, сачсен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 11 декабря 1640 г. в местности виеса, крис аннабирг, сачсен, Германия в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christoph Gärtner nació el 5 de junio de 1567, en Großrückerswalde, Mittlerer Erzgebirgskreis, Sachsen, Alemania, su papá, Bartel Gaertner, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Christina Neumann, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Christina Gaetner en 1585, en Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 11 de diciembre de 1640, en Wiesa, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Alemania, a la edad de 73 años.
